text:
Market today: Energy shock from Iran war is pushing gas and diesel prices higher, which is hitting the economy. This is the real driver for everything, including your tech/chip names.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL at -36.74% and QQQ/QQQI are TRIM at -1.3%/-3.67%. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on how oil prices (XOM, CVX, COP, XLE) are reacting and if that impacts broader tech sentiment.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and the overall market sentiment driven by energy costs.
plays: SOXL: SELL - This leveraged ETF is bleeding and the market sentiment isn't helping.
QQQ/QQQI: TRIM - These are underperforming and could be trimmed to reduce exposure.
No new buys today - hold and watch
